_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of operational assessment (i.e., BDA and Restrike Recommendation (RR)).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split design, cross-validation, evaluation metric selection, and the conditions under which each metric is appropriate.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.485), AB-K-003 (AB, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.495). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [assessment, bda, i, operational, recommendation, restrike] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, conditions, cross, design, evaluation, frameworks] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.845 (P=0.849, R=0.840). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of operational assessment (i.e., BDA and Restrike Recommendation (RR))" and "Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.486 ≈ STS 0.495 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [assessment, bda, i, operational, recommendation, restrike]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, conditions, cross, design, evaluation, frameworks].
